ads.name: Forever Paws Pet Memorial & Crematory
ads.tagline: Because the rainbow bridge has a waiting room.
ads.address: 4800 Quiet Lane, Suite B, Coral Gables, FL
ads.bio:
**Forever Paws** offers gentle, slightly over-narrated goodbyes for companions great and small. Private cremation, paw-print keepsakes, and a streaming memorial package your relatives will mute.

We do not accept roadkill referrals from neighboring BBQ establishments. Complementary lavender water for humans. Complementary judgment for people who still say “it’s just a pet.”

ads.name: Splat & Sizzle Roadkill BBQ
ads.tagline: If it was slow enough, it's dinner.
ads.bio:
Family-owned since last week, **Splat & Sizzle** serves “highway-fresh” smoked plates with a side of denial and sweet tea that could strip paint. Our pitmasters pride themselves on a nose-to-tail philosophy — especially when the tail was still attached at the shoulder of the road.

Ask about the **Daily Flattened** board. Catering available for reunions, divorces, and HOA meetings that have gone too long. Not affiliated with any Department of Transportation cleanup crew (they wish).
